click_bait.title: Ye secret trick seekh lo!
click_bait.body: Ek aisi cheez jo aapki English ko next level le jaayegi. Guess karo kya hai?

click_bait.title: Aapne ye miss kar diya!
click_bait.body: Chapter 3 mein ek twist hai jo sabko shock kar raha hai.

click_bait.title: Kya aap ye jaante the?
click_bait.body: Ye English phrase aapki life change kar sakta hai. Seriously.

fomo.title: Sab aage badh rahe hain!
fomo.body: Aapke saathi Chapter 4 mein pahunch gaye. Aap kab aa rahe ho?

fomo.title: Aaj 5000+ learners ne practice ki
fomo.body: Miss mat karo -- daily practice se results milte hain.

fomo.title: Time nikal raha hai!
fomo.body: Aapka streak tutne wala hai. Bas 5 min lagenge!

motivational.title: You're doing amazing!
motivational.body: Har chhota step count karta hai. Aaj bhi thoda practice karo.

motivational.title: Winners never quit
motivational.body: Aapne itna seekh liya hai -- ab rukna mat. Keep going!

motivational.title: Small steps, big dreams
motivational.body: Roz 10 min ki practice se English fluent hoti hai. Start karo!

relationship.title: Raj aapka wait kar raha hai!
relationship.body: Story mein Raj ko aapki help chahiye. Kya aap ready ho?

relationship.title: Priya ne kuch naya seekha
relationship.body: Aapki friend Priya ne ek interesting word seekha. Aap bhi seekho!

relationship.title: Team meeting mein drama!
relationship.body: Office mein kuch hua hai. Raj ko advice chahiye.

appreciation.title: Waah, kya baat hai!
appreciation.body: Aapne 10 activities complete kar li. Proud of you!

appreciation.title: Star performer!
appreciation.body: Aap top 10% learners mein ho. Amazing work!

appreciation.title: Thank you for learning!
appreciation.body: Aapki dedication inspiring hai. Seekhte raho!

wotd.title: Word of the Day: Resilient
wotd.body: Meaning: jo mushkilon se haar na maane. Like you!

wotd.title: Aaj ka word: Serendipity
wotd.body: Jab achhi cheezein unexpectedly mil jaayein. Learn more!

wotd.title: English Tip: 'Nevertheless'
wotd.body: Phir bhi -- use this word to sound super professional.

challenge.title: Quick Challenge!
challenge.body: 'Break a leg' ka matlab kya hai? A) Good luck B) Be careful

challenge.title: Can you beat this?
challenge.body: Top learners ne ye quiz 2 min mein solve kiya. Aap?

challenge.title: 5-minute challenge
challenge.body: Kya aap 5 sentences bana sakte ho 'although' use karke?

story_teaser.title: Aage kya hoga?
story_teaser.body: Raj ki presentation mein kuch unexpected hua. Find out!

story_teaser.title: Plot twist alert!
story_teaser.body: Chapter 4 mein ek surprise hai jo aap expect nahi kar rahe.

story_teaser.title: New chapter unlocked!
story_teaser.body: Raj aur Priya ki journey mein naya mod. Kya hoga aage?

milestone.title: 50 activities done!
milestone.body: Half century! Aapne 50 activities complete kar li. What a journey!

milestone.title: Chapter 3 complete!
milestone.body: Bohot badhiya! Ek aur chapter successfully finish.

milestone.title: 7-day streak!
milestone.body: Ek hafte se daily practice. Consistency is key!

tip.title: Pro English Tip
tip.body: Interview mein 'I think' ki jagah 'I believe' use karo. Sounds confident!

tip.title: Ye galti mat karna!
tip.body: Most Indians confuse 'lose' and 'loose'. Learn the difference.

tip.title: Quick Grammar Fix
tip.body: 'Myself Raj' nahi bolte -- 'I am Raj' bolte hain. Simple!

streak.title: Streak alive!
streak.body: Aapka 5-day streak chal raha hai. Aaj bhi continue karo!

streak.title: Don't break it!
streak.body: Aapka streak tutne wala hai. Bas 5 min practice karo.

streak.title: Streak master!
streak.body: 10 din se daily learner! Aap rockstar ho.

quiz.title: Test your English!
quiz.body: 'Piece of cake' means A) Easy B) Bakery item?

quiz.title: Kya aap jaante ho?
quiz.body: 'Spill the beans' ka matlab hai raaz batana. True or false?

recap.title: Your learning recap
recap.body: Is hafte aapne 15 new words seekhe aur 8 activities complete kiye!

recap.title: Yaad hai kya seekha?
recap.body: Last week: meetings, presentations, aur email writing. Revise karo!

recap.title: Journey so far
recap.body: 3 chapters done, 45 activities complete. Bohot achha progress!

social_proof.title: Join 10K+ learners!
social_proof.body: Hazaaron log daily SpeakX pe English improve kar rahe hain.

social_proof.title: Trending now!
social_proof.body: Chapter 3 sabse popular hai. Everyone's talking about it!

social_proof.title: Community mein aao!
social_proof.body: Aapke jaise 5000+ professionals daily practice karte hain.

humor.title: English is phunny!
humor.body: 'I before E except after C' -- English rules be like mood swings!

humor.title: Relatable?
humor.body: When you say 'I'm fine' but actually you forgot the English word.

humor.title: Grammar joke!
humor.body: Past, present, future walked into a bar. It was tense!
